cells.rationale: Credential confinement, account-scoped transport reuse, and the no-replay stream cutoff form subtle security and correctness invariants across a new provider boundary.
Cross-process locking, transient routing state, strict schemas, and daemon lifecycle integration create a cross-cutting architectural cascade with subtle concurrency invariants.
Atomic proof-gated activation, rollback recovery, launcher wiring, and installer compatibility require security-critical correctness across many coupled surfaces.
